images.depicts: bright horizontal motion-blur streak with trailing sparks on dark stage
chick spinning wide-eyed, wings up, question marks popping above
four-legged realistic sheep squinting at 3 fuzzy shapes, hoof raised
images.issue: minor cast-continuity note — this sheep is a 3rd realistic four-legged design, distinct from other weeks' round wool-blob sheep, but internally consistent within this book

images.depicts: coiled leather whip revealed in light, chick leaning in
sheep + small wooden sailing ship in beam of light
chick and sheep back-to-back scanning with crossing flashlight beams
chick and sheep with swirling motion-blur circling them
plain potato skidded to a halt with skid marks, chick + sheep gawking

line_map.needs: acceptable-hold (abstract question chant, no fixed scene)

line_map.line: What? Where? Why? The wh words ask and ask!
Whip and whiz — so quick! Whiz! (zoom!) Whip! (snap!)
Outro: When? Which? What? Where? Why? (who… knows…)
Which is it? Which is it? What is it? Where is it?
When can Chick get it? Whiz! It went so quick!
What is it? Where is it? Why is it so quick?
Outro: Which… when… what… where… why… A potato?! (POTATO!) THAT is it!

auditor_note: This is the cleanest week of the five: all 17 manifest assets present, book spreads image-complete, no missing generates, no wrong-art. The 'question words' (which/when/what/where/why) themselves have no dedicated per-word image and never will — they are abstract function words matched only via SCENE content (sheep-which/chick-what/where-look), which is correct and by design. A naive filename-exact-match auditor would score these lines 0%; content-based scoring shows full coverage.
